title: lithocardium exaltatum
intro: Lithocardium exaltatum, also known as Lithospermum exaltatum, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as a diuretic and a mild cardiac stimulant, making it useful in treating conditions like hypertension and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of lithocardium exaltatum include its ability to improve circulation, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of edema. Lithocardium exaltatum is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in herbal teas and topical applications for its medicinal properties.
